name: Village full of Elf and dark Elfs
description:
Welcome to the village where dark elf's and elf are at peace!

You a lonely knight was on a adventure a very serious adventure you didn't know what is it or where it was but when you meet the king he gave you your quest which was years ago but then you stumble across a sign.. a sign about elf and dark elf are at peace and always allow human travels to stay the night. what the worst that could happen?
creator: Ulitmate Titan Speakerman
